standard.label: Standard Article
standard.description: A regular reported or written article. Default profile.

interview.label: Interview / Q&A
interview.description: Question-and-answer format with a subject. Renders the intro and Q&A block.

longread.label: Long-form Investigation
longread.description: Multi-section deep-dive with additional sourcing box and extended reading time display.

photoessay.label: Photo Essay
photoessay.description: Image-driven narrative. Full-bleed images and minimal chrome.

podcast.label: Podcast Episode
podcast.description: Audio-first post. Shows an audio player above the transcript. Set `audioUrl` in front matter.

datavisualization.label: Data Visualization
datavisualization.description: Chart or interactive piece. Renders a full-width figure area. Set `embedUrl` in front matter.

brief.label: Brief
brief.description: A short-form news brief under 300 words. No by-line, no share buttons.

explainer.label: Explainer
explainer.description: Contextual piece that breaks down a topic. Renders with an on-page summary box at the top.
